zh.Craigmillar Castle Park Cemetery, Craigm: 英國蘇格蘭艾丁波可萊格米拉可萊格米拉 卡素 帕克 其特利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John I Preston於1391年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波時，他的父親Sir George Preston I Laird of Craigmillar26歲，母親Eleanor Annabella De Farnelleis21歲。他於1416年與Christian Cockburn在英國英格蘭越可爾蘭頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1425年在他的家鄉享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John I Preston于1391年出生在英国苏格兰艾丁波时，他的父亲Sir George Preston I Laird of Craigmillar26岁，母亲Eleanor Annabella De Farnelleis21岁。他于1416年与Christian Cockburn在英国英格兰越可爾蘭頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1425年在他的家乡享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John I Preston was born in 1391, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir George Preston I Laird of Craigmillar, was 26 and his mother, Eleanor Annabella De Farnelleis, was 21. He married Christian Cockburn in 1416, in Langton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1425, in his hometown, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John I Preston est né en 1391, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir George Preston I Laird of Craigmillar, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Annabella De Farnelleis, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Christian Cockburn en 1416, à Langton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1425, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John I Preston(이)가 1391년 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir George Preston I Laird of Craigmillar(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Annabella De Farnelleis(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1416년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 랭턴에서 Christian Cockburn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1425년 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John I Preston родился в 1391 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir George Preston I Laird of Craigmillar было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Annabella De Farnelleis, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian Cockburn в 1416 г. в местности лангтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.
